summary: Iteration 6 — Verified ENOENT splash-icon fix, edge-to-edge tab/header padding, and the splash + login redesign with SVG pattern background. All 13 review items pass. Backend regression: GET /api/ returns version 1.0.0 and POST /api/calc/cytology {pc:20,sc:80} returns Estrus (pytest 2/2 PASS). Frontend (390x844 mobile viewport): splash renders TANUVAS seal, funding banner, framed circular logo (no raw white square), institution panel, GUIDED BY pill with all 5 doctors, ANIMitra dev info, Dr. T. Lokesh + +91 99444 72488 chips, Version 1.0.0 pill, LOADING bar, ©. SVG pattern background renders 1 svg with 38 circles and 10 paths (dots, helix curves, paws). Tap-to-skip → /login works. Login page shows floating framed logo, brand 'Doggy Breeding App', BREED·TRACK·CARE tagline, 4 feature chips (Cytology, Progesterone, Heat Cycle, PDF Reports), single glass auth panel, disabled 'Sign in with Google', and gradient 'Continue without Google' which creates user → routes to /register?user_id=...&prefilled=1. Tabs (Home/History/Learn/Settings) render with 66px bar height (58 + 8 floor padding) and each tab is tappable. ScreenHeader on /evaluation/new renders with the back chevron + 'New Evaluation' title below the top edge (paddingTop floor of 12 enforced). app.json package=com.animitra.doggybreeding, versionCode=1, splash plugin image=./assets/images/splash-icon.png, splash-icon.png file exists (118 KB). Same Expo console warnings carry over from iter5 (deprecated pointerEvents prop and useNativeDriver on web) — cosmetic only.

react_native_issues.issue: Uses prop `pointerEvents="none"` on <View>. RN web warns: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: /app/frontend/src/components/PatternBackground.tsx:15. Cosmetic only — move to style={{pointerEvents:'none'}}.

Console warns 'useNativeDriver is not supported... Falling back to JS-based animation' on the web preview. Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:23-32 and /app/frontend/app/login.tsx:38-46. Functionally OK; native builds (APK) will use the native driver. Optional: platform-gate useNativeDriver.

action_items: (Cosmetic only) In /app/frontend/src/components/PatternBackground.tsx:15 replace `pointerEvents="none"` prop with `style={[StyleSheet.absoluteFill, { pointerEvents: 'none' }]}` to silence the deprecation warning.
(Optional) Platform-gate Animated useNativeDriver (false on web) in app/index.tsx and app/login.tsx to suppress the web-only warning. Functional behavior already correct.
critical_code_review_comments: Splash + Login redesign delivered: single info/auth panel, framed circular logo (ring + glow rings), floating animation, gradient backdrop + SVG pattern (paws/dots/helix). Matches the iter6 redesign brief.
app.json: edgeToEdgeEnabled true with added android.navigationBar config. android.package/versionCode correctly set. expo-splash-screen plugin path resolves; splash-icon.png exists.
(tabs)/_layout.tsx: paddingBottom = Math.max(insets.bottom, 14 on Android, 8 on iOS) and height = 58 + bottomPad — guarantees tab buttons clear the Android gesture bar.
ScreenHeader.tsx: paddingTop = Math.max(insets.top, 12) + 8 ensures header never hugs status bar.

Login 'Continue without Google' has testID=continue-without-google-button; navigates to /register with prefilled=1 — verified end-to-end (backend POST /api/auth/google returned 200, PUT /api/users/{id} 200, dashboard reachable).
seed_data_creation: Created one transient test user (POST /api/auth/google then PUT) during register-flow validation; no cleanup endpoint exists. Non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter6 fixes verified at 390x844. Splash & login redesign rendered with SVG pattern (38 circles/10 paths), logo framed in gradient ring. Tabs height=66 (58+8). evaluation/new header renders. Only carry-over cosmetic console warnings: deprecated pointerEvents prop (PatternBackground.tsx:15) and useNativeDriver on web. Pytest regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter6_regression.py — 2/2 PASS.
